title: Creator of Crunchyroll’s Biggest New Isekai of The Year Breaks Silence on Anime Sequel
content: 2026 kicks off with the exciting Winter 2026 lineup, which includes the return of major series such as Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3, Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End Season 3, Hell’s Paradise Season 3, and many more series.
author: ComicBook

title: Black Clover’s Ending Draws Near With a New Update From Shonen Jump
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Black Clover manga! After 11 years of serialization, Yuki Tabata’s hit action-fantasy series Black Clover is closer to its finale than ever. The manga entered its Final Arc in 2022 before transitioning to Shueisha’s Jump GIGA magazine on a quarterly schedule in 2023.
author: ComicBook

title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Game Gets 'Future Saga Chapter 4' DLC in Summer
content: Bandai Namco Entertainment America announced during the Dragon Ball Games Battle Hour event in Los Angeles on Sunday that the Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 game's final DLC, the "FUTURE SAGA Chapter 4," will launch this summer.
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball: Sparking! Zero Game Gets New 'Super Limit Breaking NEO' DLC
content: The "Dragon Ball Games Battle Hour 2026" event announced on Sunday that Dragon Ball: Sparking! Zero , the new game in the Dragon Ball Z: Budokai Tenkaichi arena fighter franchise, will get a new "Super Limit Breaking NEO" DLC in summer 2026. The game will also introduce a new game mode in a free update.
author: ANN

title: One Piece Gives First Glimpse At Imu’s True Powers And It’s More Terrifying Than Ever
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the One Piece manga! The Elbaph Arc of One Piece is turning out to be more exciting than fans ever imagined. The latest arc was foreshadowed in the Little Garden Arc, where the Straw Hat Pirates met proud Giant Warriors Dorry and Brogy.
author: ComicBook

title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Game Announced
content: Bandai Namco Entertainment America announced during the "Dragon Ball Games Battle Hour 2026" event in Los Angeles on Sunday that the previously teased "Age 1000" game project is actually Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 , the third game in the Dragon Ball Xenoverse game series.
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus Anime's New Trailer Teases Frieza's Return
content: The Dragon Ball Games Battle Hour event in Los Angeles unveiled a new "Super Gekitou" (fierce battle) trailer on Sunday for the Dragon Ball Super: Beerus television anime series, which will air on Fuji TV this fall. The end of the video teases the return of Freiza.
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball Debuts New Bulma Anime Makeover (& It’s Great)
content: Dragon Ball has debuted Bulma’s next major anime makeover, and just like all the other ones seen before it’s a great one. Dragon Ball officially kicked off the 40th anniversary of its celebration for the original release of Akira Toriyama’s original manga debut for Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine.
author: ComicBook

title: New Dragon Ball Super Remake Trailer Confirms Surprise Return From Major Villain
content: Dragon Ball Super has dropped a new trailer for its now in the works remake anime, and with it has confirmed that it’s going to feature a major return that fans did not expect to see in action. As part of the celebration for Dragon Ball’ s 40th anniversary, the franchise is set to make its comeback in a huge way.
author: ComicBook

title: One Piece Debuts Luffy’s New Gear 5 Look With Elbaph Arc
content: One Piece is now in the midst of the Elbaph arc with the anime’s new episodes now airing as part of the Spring 2026 anime schedule, and the newest episode has given Luffy’s Gear 5 form a cool new look for the occasion.
author: ComicBook
